title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Santa Marta: Ministers grapple with practicalities of fossil fuel phase-out
items.description:

items.title: Santa Marta marks a new chapter in climate diplomacy
items.description:
Through its inclusive approach, the first global summit on the fossil fuel transition can co-create solutions that respond to what’s needed on the ground

items.title: New panel of climate scientists calls for fossil fuel transition roadmaps
items.description:

items.title: New loss and damage fund could run out of money next year
items.description:

items.title: Why the transition beyond fossil fuels depends on cities and collective action
items.description:

items.title: Prospects for global green shipping deal boosted by US tariff ruling, analysts say

items.title: This week’s IMO green shipping talks are a test for multilateralism
items.description:

items.title: Sixty countries head to Santa Marta to cement coalition for fossil fuel transition

items.title: China’s solar exports reach “gigantic” record in March as energy crisis bites
items.description:

items.title: To phase out fossil fuels, developing countries need exit route from “debt trap”
items.description:

items.title: Extreme heat is rewriting food security. The best fixes are already within reach

items.title: Earth Day is an opportunity for communities to show the way on climate action
items.description:

items.title: Solar surge kept fossil electricity flat in 2025 as China and India made ‘historic’ shift

items.title: US pressure puts World Bank’s climate plan at risk

items.title: As US and China seek rare earths, Brazilian lawmakers push for state-owned developer

items.title: EU carbon tax risks penalising efficient producers over data gaps

items.title: IEA slashes pre-war oil demand forecast by nearly a million barrels per day
items.description:
